name: M10 Inc Which Will Do Bus
recent_news: No evidence of an operating school-bus business under this name. Address 817 Main St, Brownsville, WI is the headquarters of Michels Corporation (large utility/construction contractor). D&B lists 'M10, Inc.' at Brownsville, WI under Investment Firms industry, not transportation. The 'which will do bus' tail appears to be a Wisconsin corporate-purpose clause artifact rather than an active operating school-bus company.
fit_notes: Not a viable Summit tuck-in target. Appears to be a data artifact / holding entity rather than an operating school-bus contractor; address tied to Michels Corp utility contractor. Drop from list.

name: Malliette Bus Co Inc
recent_news: Became sole contractor for Antigo Unified School District after acquiring all buses from Mid Wisconsin Bus Company and hiring most of its drivers, producing ~100% year-over-year growth (Langlade County EDC profile). Established 1971 in Antigo, WI.
fit_notes: Solid small WI family-owned tuck-in candidate: sole contractor for Antigo USD, demonstrated consolidator behavior (rolled up Mid Wisconsin Bus). Grosskurth family ownership and ~50+ year history suggest possible succession opportunity. Geography is northern WI rural, outside Summit's core states but consistent with Beacon/Riteway competition.

name: Sawtelle's Bus Svc
recent_news: No live web presence found. Address (160 Capitol St, Augusta, ME) is in the state-government district, not a typical bus yard. Augusta Public Schools currently contracts First Student of Hudson, NH for student transportation, so Sawtelle's is not the Augusta district contractor. Company may be inactive, very small, or mislabeled in source data.
fit_notes: Unverified as an active independent operator. Augusta ME's school transport is held by First Student (strategic owned). Low priority until ME Secretary of State and DOT records confirm active operations and fleet.

name: Tomahawk Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: School District of Tomahawk (contracted bus service provider)
recent_news: FMCSA SAFER snapshot (USDOT 437593, MC-1752971) shows 22 power units and 25 drivers, satisfactory safety rating (non-ratable since 2006, last reviewed Oct 2024), zero crashes/inspections in trailing 24 months. Tomahawk School District confirms bus passes are issued through 'Tomahawk Bus Company office' at (715) 453-3000 - the district's de facto contractor. Note: source data address (307 W Evans St, Rice Lake) is incorrect; FMCSA and the district list 1801 Kaphaem Rd, Tomahawk, WI 54487.
fit_notes: Clean small WI single-district operator (~22 buses) with established Tomahawk USD relationship and clean safety record. Reasonable bolt-on at single-yard scale; principals/owners not yet identified online so succession read-through is unknown. Address in source list appears mislabeled - re-verify HQ before outreach.

name: Pitts Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: School District of Crandon (Forest County, WI) area
recent_news: No M&A or notable news located. Maintains a Yelp business listing (updated 2026) for Crandon, WI at 11491 County Road M. No website found; operates as a small rural single-yard school-bus contractor in Forest County.
fit_notes: Very small rural northern-WI school-bus operator (~20 employees, manager Ted Paque). Likely single-district Crandon USD contract. Sub-scale tuck-in candidate; only attractive if combined with neighboring WI operators (e.g. Malliette in Antigo, Tomahawk Bus Service) to build a northern-WI regional cluster. Verify ownership and fleet via WI DOT/DPI school bus records before outreach.
